headline: Which Big-Box Store Chain Has Dominated 2026: Walmart, Target, or Costco?
summary: Shares of Target (NYSE:TGT) are changing hands near $129 in midday trading Tuesday, up 1% on the session and sitting on a year-to-date gain of 32%. That run has turned the longtime laggard into the surprise leader of the big-box pack in 2026. By comparison, Walmart (NASDAQ:WMT) stock is up 18% year to date and ... headline: This Boring ETF Owns Some Of The Toughest Businesses In America
summary: Consumer sentiment sits at 53.3 in March 2026, deep in the pessimistic zone, while retail sales just hit a fresh high of $752.1 billion. That gap between how Americans feel and how much they spend is the entire reason a fund like the Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLP) exists. People grumble, then they ...
